evals.description: Triggers on customer health score build request
evals.prompt: I need to build a customer health score model for our B2B SaaS product. What signals should I include and how should I weight them?
How can I predict which customers are about to churn before they actually cancel?
I have a Quarterly Business Review with our largest enterprise customer next week. Help me prepare the agenda.

evals.description: Correctly identifies expansion signals from usage and org spread
evals.prompt: Our customer is using 90% of their seat licenses and two new departments just started using the product. Is this an expansion opportunity?

evals.description: Catches health score with only one dimension
evals.prompt: My current health score only looks at login frequency. What am I missing?

evals.description: Provides correct red account recovery protocol
evals.prompt: One of our enterprise accounts just dropped to a red health score. What should I do in the next 72 hours?
We have 500 customers ranging from $2K to $200K ARR. How should I segment them for CS coverage?

evals.description: Understands churn velocity vs stable low score
evals.prompt: Account A has a health score of 55 that has been stable for months. Account B dropped from 80 to 60 in one month. Which is higher risk?
For our QBR, I am planning to walk the customer through all the new features we shipped last quarter. Good idea?

evals.description: Does not invent non-standard CS frameworks
evals.prompt: Explain the Customer Success Quantum Matrix and the Retention Elasticity Score frameworks.

assertions.value: Customer Success Quantum Matrix is a
Retention Elasticity Score is defined as

evals.description: Correctly explains expansion timing relative to customer health
evals.prompt: When is the right time to have an expansion conversation with a customer?

evals.description: Produces correct NRR definition and benchmark
evals.prompt: What is NRR and what is a good NRR benchmark for a B2B SaaS company?
